---
pagetitle: "Maize Combining Ability — gcamoz"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    embed-resources: true
    code-tools: false
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
**Rendered reports:**
[Multilocation RCBD GCA/SCA](multilocation_alpha_lattice.html) ·
[GCA/SCA teaching notebook](gca_calculation.html) ·
[Full diallel](diallel_gca_sca_analysis.html) ·
[Simulation](gca_simulation.html) ·
[Genesys CML retrieval](retrieve_CML_genesys.html) ·
[Iris ANOVA + CLD](iris_anova_cld.html)
:::

{{< include README.md >}}
